steps.t: Burning idols can be found at Tham Lorn in the western Fields of Fornost. You should disable the idols, and stop the corruption from this part of Forn…
Burning idols can be found at Tham Lorn in the western Fields of Fornost. You should disable the idols, and stop the corruption from this part of Forn…
Mincham awaits you at his camp. You have disabled many of the burning idols at Tham Lorn, and should tell Mincham what you accomplished.
